titleStmt.title: SII 17.244: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 244. (A.R. No. 222 of 1904.) MĒLŚĒVŪR, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra of the Vṛishabhapurīśvara temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti, Kaḍal śūḻnda pār, etc., of Rājādhirāja II. The details of date given viz., 13th year, Kaṟkaṭaka 13, Wednesday, ba. 11, Rōhiṇi correspond to 1175 A.D., July 15, Tuesday not Wednesday, ·77, ·32. See Introduction page (iii). It refers to Ammai Appaṉ Pāṇḍi alias Rājarāja Śambuvarāyaṉ and his grandfather Ammai Appaṉ Kulamāṇikkam Pāṇḍināḍu-koṇḍār.

This records the grant of land as archchanāviśēsham to god Tiruttāṉtōṉṟi Āḷuḍaiyār of Śēvūr in Uttamaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by Ammai Appaṉ Pāṇḍi alias Rājarāja Śambuvarāyaṉ. The gift-land which was situated in Arakkarāmūr alias Rājēndraśōḻanallūr in Ōymānāḍu alias Vijaiyarājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu was bought by the donor's grandfather, Ammai Appaṉ Kulamāṇikkam Pāṇḍināḍu-koṇḍār and the title to that land was confirmed by the Ūrār of the above-mentioned place in the 5th year of Rājādhirāja II under orders of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kaṭalcūḻntapārm(ā)tarum pūmātarum nāmātarum Aṭalcūḻnta jayamātaru mmarntu vāḻa tennavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷaru mutalāya maṉnavarum tiṟai kuṇantuvan tīṇṭiccevippa vāḻiyūḻi varuñceṅkol
Eḻupāruminitaḷippa cempon virasiṁhāsanattu Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻāṉaṭikaḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya koirācakecāpanmarāṉa tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājā[ dhirā] jadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu kaṟkaṭakaṉāyaṟṟup patitmuṉṟāntīyati nāḷ [�]
ṉa putankiḻamaiyu maparapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum peṟṟa rocaṇi nāḷ ceṅkeṇi Ammaiyappaṉ pāṇṭiya rājarājaccampuvarāyaṉen jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Ut tamacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuc cevūr tiruttāntoṉṟi Āḷuṭaiyārk
ku Arccanāśeṣamāka nāṉ viṭṭa nilamāvatu Immaṇṭalattu Oymānāṭāṉa vijayarājendra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Āmurnāṭṭu Ārakkarāmurāṉa rājendracoḻanallūrile Eṅkaḷ pāṭṭaṉār Ammaiyappaṉ kulamāṇikkam pāṇṭināṭu ko
ṇṭār Ūrār pakkal vilaikkukkoṇṭuṭaiya maṉaiyum viḷainilamum toṭṭamum Aṉupavittu vārāṉiṟka Ittevaṟku Añcāvatu paḻaṅkāṇiyāḷare peṟuvatāka prasādañceytaruḷi Uḷvariyum peṟṟu Ūrār taṅkaḷile samharikkinapotu Eṉ kāṇi Eṉakke
pramāṇam paṇṇittanta pramāṇappaṭi śrīmeykkirtti Eḻuti tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Oymāṉāṭāṉa vijaya[ rājendra va] ḷanāṭṭu Āmurnāṭṭu Ārkarāmurāṉa rājendracoḻa nallūrom Ammai Ap
paṉ pāṇṭiyāṉa rājarājacampuvarāyarkku nāṅkaḷ bhūmipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttaparicāvatu Eṅkaḷ pakkal Ivar pāṭṭaṉār Ammaiappaṉ kulamāṇikkam pāṇṭināṭukoṇ vastu viṭṭukkoṇṭa maṉai vaṭakkilteruvil vaṭaciṟakil rājendracoḻapperu
nteruvukku meṟkuk kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻapperunteruvukkuk kiḻakku maṉai Eḻināṟ kiḻmel kol 2 10 1 kku vāl niḷaṅ kol Eḻāka kuḻi 100 7 m toṭṭattil śrīdevaṟ karuṇākara vāykkālukku vaṭakku Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟil nālāñcatirattu teṟ
kaṭaiya nilam nālumāviṟ kiḻakkaṭaiya 5 100 2 kuḻi koṇṭatu Orumāvāka vanta nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Ikkaṇṇāṟu Añcāñcatirattu muṅkiṟceṟunilam Eṭṭumā ṇṭu paḻaṅkāṇi Āḷare peṟukaveṉṟu Eṅkaḷ sommāṉa bhūmikku pra
sādañceytaruḷina tirumukamum Uḷvariyum peṟṟu Eṅkaḷil samharikkiṟa Iṭattu Ivaṟku Immaṉaiyuntoṭṭamum viḷaini(la)mum muṉpu nāṅkaḷ kuṭuttapaṭiye meṉokkina mā muṅ kiṇokkina kiṇaṟum Ivaṟku viṟṟoṟṟi pratikraya dānaṅkaḷukku Urittāvatāka sa
mmatittukkuṭuttom Ārakkarāmurāṉa rājendracoḻanallūr Ūrom Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Eḻutineṉ Ūṟkaṇakku Ārkkārāmuruṭaiyāṉ ponmalaikaṟpattiṉ Eḻuttu kku Ivai vallaṅkiḻāṉ cāntinātaṉ kumaraṉeḻuttu Ivai kūṭalki
ḻāṉ kaṇṭi meṟṟicai niṉṟāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nilam peṟukiḻavaṉ vayiri saṭhañjaiyāṉa maikkup ponmalai kaṟpakattin Eḻuttu malaiyampākkiḻāṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ ca niṉṟāṉ Eḻuttu Itu koṟṟamuḻāṉ pattaṉ
sṭhañjaiyāṉamaikkup ponmalai kaṟpakattiṉ Eḻuttu Ivai neṟkuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ nāyakaṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉeḻuttu Ivai Ilattamuḻāṉ nāyakannāṉa paṇa Immaṉaiyum toṭṭa mum viḷainilamum Iddevaṟku Arccanā
viśeṣamākak kuṭutteṉ Itukku Aḻivu ceyvār keṅkaiiṭaik kumariiṭai ceytār ceyta pāpaṅkoḷvār Aṟamaṟavaṟka Aṟamallatu tuṇai Illai Itu paṉ māheśvara rakṣai . � .
Digital edition of SII 17.244 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
